name: Rochester Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes, peppers, onions, and celery coarsely.
2. Add salt to the chopped vegetables and allow them to stand overnight. Drain any excess liquid.
3. Heat the vinegar in a large pot until it reaches boiling point.
4. Gradually add sugar, mustard, broken stick cinnamon, allspice, cloves, mace, and green tomatoes to the boiling vinegar. Stir well to combine.
5. Add the chopped onions and celery to the mixture.
6. Cook over medium heat for approximately 30 minutes, stirring occasionally until the flavors are well blended and the mixture has thickened slightly.
